title: UFOs & Religion: Vatican Reveals Hidden Link (Ft. Diana Pasulka)
summary: Diana Walsh Pasulka, a religious studies professor, discusses connections between historical religious experiences and modern UFO encounters, her research into crash retrieval sites, and how studying the phenomenon led to her own transformation. The interview explores themes of consciousness, religious history, scapegoating theory, and the nature of anomalous experiences.

acronyms.definition: Intelligent systems that some researchers theorize UFOs may represent or be connected to
US government space agency where Tyler worked as a mission controller
US intelligence agency referenced in context of psychological warfare operations

events.description: Diana Pasulka visited a crash retrieval site in New Mexico with Tyler and Gary Nolan
Tyler's colleague astronaut died in the NASA Challenger mission
Diana Pasulka began her study of the UFO phenomenon
Diana Pasulka began documenting historical cases of nuns, priests, and saints reporting divine or angelic contact
Betty and Barney Hill reported seeing aliens with eyes wrapped around the rim of their heads
Dorothy Martin and followers believed they received a UFO prophecy about an impending apocalypse
Walter B. Smith, CIA director, stated they would use the phenomena for psychological warfare purposes in Cold War
Stanley Kubrick gave an interview about the monolith interpretation in 2001: A Space Odyssey
John Mack published book 'Abduction' describing UFO encounters
Diana Pasulka started meeting people from technology communities including AI creators and quantum computing specialists

key_claims.claim: Tyler works as a mission controller in the Space Force and previously worked on NASA missions including the Challenger
Tyler goes to a room with a machine and receives ideas about biomedical innovations that lead to successful companies
There were multiple UFO crashes in New Mexico in the 1940s, not just Roswell
Materials found at the New Mexico crash site had anomalous isotope ratios not generally found on Earth
Original translations of St. Francis of Assisi's experience describe encountering atmospheric sparks, a flaming torch, and being wounded with rays of light rather than seeing Christ
Stephen Dick, NASA historian, suggested more than 20 years ago that UFOs were a form of AI
Robert Hastings has had many anomalous experiences since he started studying the UFO phenomenon
Water conducts electricity and hydration is important for connecting with signals or information
The UFO phenomenon is a new form of religion that combines science and religion
A Vatican priest blessed Diana Pasulka's American Cosmic project

topics: AI and temporal theories of UFOs
